events.title: KS Chithra Live
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, Carnatic, Playback, South Indian Classical
events.description: KS Chithra — the nightingale of South India — brings her divine voice live in an evening of Carnatic classical renditions, beloved Malayalam and Tamil playback hits, and the kind of musical grace that transcends generations.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: KS Chithra is one of South India's most revered and beloved singers — genZScore 2-4. Her audience is deeply devoted, multigenerational, and culturally rooted — classical music enthusiasts, South Indian families, and younger GenZ admirers of her legendary playback catalog. The concert energy is reverent, graceful, and culturally proud. The fashion language is traditional South Indian ethnic — silk sarees, pavadai davani, ethnic sets in rich South Indian colors and weaves. This is a premium cultural concert — people dress with deep respect for the artist and the music. Women in Kanjivaram or silk-feel cotton sarees, ethnic sets with temple jewellery, or a beautifully draped traditional look. Men in traditional veshti-kurta or dhoti-kurta. The color palette is rich and South Indian — deep jewel tones, temple colors, rich reds, greens, blues, and gold. Temple jewellery is the dominant jewellery style — heavy, gold-tone, South Indian traditional. Carnatic music context means the dressing is as refined and classical as the music itself.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: KS Chithra live is the most culturally refined dressing moment of the season — the nightingale deserves your most graceful ethnic look. Lead with silk-feel cotton or Kanjivaram-inspired sarees in deep jewel tones — rich reds, forest greens, deep navy, and royal purple with heavy gold zari borders are the most appropriate and stunning choices. Temple-border weave sarees are uniquely relevant for a Carnatic classical concert — the cultural textile reference matches the musical tradition. Women in a beautifully draped saree with a fitted blouse, or a rich ethnic set in deep jewel tones with temple jewellery. Men in a crisp white or cream veshti with a silk kurta or angavastram — the most traditional and respectful South Indian concert dressing. Temple jewellery is the absolute hero accessory — heavy gold-tone layered necklaces, long jhumkas, temple ear studs, thick bangles, and kamarbandh. Kalamkari and ikat-inspired ethnic sets are a strong fusion option for younger attendees. Kids ethnic sets in rich colors are very relevant — KS Chithra concerts are deeply family affairs. The overall energy is — dressed with the same grace and intention that she brings to every note.

app.headline: The Nightingale Sings. Dress Accordingly.
lines: Silk saree, temple jewels — KS Chithra night sorted.
Carnatic classical deserves your most graceful ethnic look.
Kanjivaram weaves and gold jhumkas for a legendary voice.

social_media.headline: Dressed For The Nightingale Of South India.
lines: POV: wore a deep red silk saree with temple jewellery to KS Chithra live and the music felt even more divine.
KS Chithra concert fit check — jewel-toned saree, gold temple jewellery, dressed as gracefully as she sings.

events.title: Calvin Harris Live
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, EDM, Electronic, Dance, Pop
events.description: Calvin Harris brings his stadium-sized electronic anthems live — a night of relentless bangers, euphoric drops, and the kind of dancefloor energy that turns a concert into a full-body experience.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Calvin Harris is one of the biggest EDM and electronic pop acts in the world — genZScore 9-10. His concerts are massive, high-energy, outdoor or large indoor venue events — think stadium EDM meets festival fashion. The crowd is peak GenZ and millennial party energy — dressed to dance, dressed to be seen, dressed for the drop. This is a significant step up even from DJ Snake in terms of scale and mainstream pop crossover — Summer, Feel So Close, One Kiss, Promises — his catalog is massive and the crowd reflects that breadth. The fashion energy is maximalist festival meets club-ready — sequins, metallics, cut-outs, neon, color-block, crop lengths, and the kind of fits that look incredible under strobe lights. April in Bengaluru means warmth — lighter fabrics, more skin-baring silhouettes. Colors are electric and bold — neon pinks, electric blues, silver metallics, bold reds, and multi-color festival palettes. Women in sequin co-ords, metallic mini dresses, neon sets, cut-out tops. Men in color-blocked streetwear, bold printed shirts, or a sleek dark set with neon accessories. Jewellery is maximalist and statement.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Calvin Harris live is the biggest EDM fashion moment of the season — dress like the drop is your cue to walk in. The scale of a Calvin Harris concert means the fashion energy is festival-level, not just club-level — think Coachella meets Bengaluru nightlife. Women in a full sequin mini dress in silver or electric pink, a metallic halter co-ord, a neon cut-out set, or a shimmer top with a color-blocked mini skirt — anything that catches strobe light and moves beautifully on the dancefloor. The April Bengaluru warmth means more skin-baring silhouettes are appropriate — cut-outs, off-shoulder, spaghetti straps. Men in a bold color-blocked oversized tee with cargo shorts, a holographic or printed shirt open over a graphic tee, or a sleek all-black set with neon accessories. Neon is the accent color of the night — one neon piece transforms any look. Sequins and metallic fabrics are the single most relevant catalog categories. Chunky statement jewellery — large hoops, ear cuffs, layered chains, stacked rings. Holographic or metallic mini bags. Caps and bucket hats for men. Nail art is very relevant — this crowd does full festival beauty. Summer feel means lighter fabrics — spandex, nylon, and satin over heavy materials.

app.headline: One Kiss With This Fit. Go.
lines: Sequins, metallics, neon — Calvin Harris dancefloor sorted.
Feel So Close in a silver co-ord — that's the brief.
Festival fashion for Bengaluru's biggest EDM night.

social_media.headline: Summer Drops. So Does This Fit.
lines: POV: Calvin Harris plays Promises and your sequin dress becomes the whole show.
Calvin Harris fit check — metallic co-ord, neon accents, ear cuffs, dressed like the drop was made for you.

events.title: Bangalore Open Air (BOA)
events.genres: Music, Festival, Heavy Metal, Death Metal, Thrash Metal, Rock
events.description: Bangalore Open Air returns — India's most iconic heavy metal festival bringing together the heaviest international and domestic metal acts for a full day of headbanging, mosh pits, and the most intense live music experience on the Indian calendar.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Bangalore Open Air is India's premier heavy metal festival — genZScore 8-10. BOA is not just a concert, it is a culture — the Indian metal community dresses with deep genre knowledge and tribal pride. This is significantly darker and more extreme than Linkin Park or Def Leppard — this is death metal, thrash metal, black metal territory. The fashion language is pure metal — all black everything, band tees from obscure and legendary metal acts, battle jackets covered in patches, ripped denim, studded accessories, black boots implied. The outdoor festival context in April Bengaluru means heat — lightweight black fabrics, sleeveless cuts, breathable cotton. Band merchandise is the single most important catalog category — graphic tees with metal band artwork, skull prints, dark abstract prints. Women in black band tees, ripped black denim, fishnet layers, or a dark co-ord. Men in band tees, black cargo trousers, ripped denim. Jewellery is dark and heavy — spikes, chains, skulls, dark metal pieces. No color except black. No fusion. No ethnic. Zero pastels.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: BOA is India's most extreme fashion moment — the metal community dresses with genre knowledge and tribal pride. The absolute rule is all black, always — any deviation marks you as an outsider. Band tees are the hero category and the most culturally loaded piece at BOA — graphic metal band tees in black with dark abstract or skull-inspired artwork. The battle jacket is uniquely iconic for this festival — a black denim or leather jacket covered in band patches and pins is the ultimate BOA flex, but since patches aren't catalog items, a plain black denim or leather-look jacket is the base. Women in oversized black band tees knotted or tucked into ripped black skinny jeans or black cargo shorts, fishnet layers under a band tee, or a dark co-ord with studded details. Sleeveless cuts are important — April Bengaluru heat plus outdoor festival plus mosh pit energy means arms need to be free and cool. Men in black band tees with heavily distressed black denim or black cargo trousers. Ripped and heavily distressed denim is the most relevant denim category — the heavier the distress the better. Chain necklaces, spike bracelets, chunky silver rings, ear studs, and dark cross pendants are the jewellery signature. Caps backward. Crossbody or sling bags only — hands free for horns up. The overall energy is — dressed like you've been to every BOA since the beginning and your band tee collection is your biography.

app.headline: BOA Is Here. All Black. Always.
lines: Band tee, battle jacket, ripped black denim — BOA uniform.
Heavy metal festival fits for India's most intense music day.
Dressed in black from the first riff to the last breakdown.

social_media.headline: Horns Up. Fits Down. BOA Season.
lines: POV: walked into Bangalore Open Air in a vintage band tee and heavily distressed black denim and the pit welcomed you home.
BOA fit check — all black, graphic band tee, chain necklace, zero color, maximum metal. Horns up.

events.title: Scorpions World Tour
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, Rock, Classic Rock, Hard Rock, Arena Rock
events.description: The Scorpions bring their legendary world tour to India — five decades of hard rock royalty, from Wind of Change to Rock You Like A Hurricane, in a night that proves some bands only get bigger with time.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Scorpions World Tour is a legendary arena rock moment — genZScore 7-9. Bigger and more globally iconic than Def Leppard, the Scorpions draw an even wider crowd — original fans who've followed them for decades alongside a younger GenZ crowd discovering classic rock through Stranger Things, TikTok, and vinyl culture. The fashion energy is classic rock elevated — this is arena rock, not a small venue, which means the dressing scales up accordingly. The Scorpions aesthetic references the golden era of rock — leather jackets, band tees, ripped denim, studded accessories, bandanas — but with an arena scale energy that pushes toward rock-glam territory. April Bengaluru warmth means lighter layering — the leather jacket is still essential but sleeveless options become relevant. Colors are dark and powerful — black dominates with deep red, charcoal, white graphic accents, and occasional silver metallic rock-glam touches. Women can push toward rock-glam — sequin accents, dark co-ords with studded details, ripped denim with a metallic top. Men in classic band tees, dark denim, leather jackets. The vintage band tee culture is as strong here as at BOA but with a more mainstream rock energy. Wind of Change plays and every outfit in the crowd becomes iconic.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Scorpions World Tour is arena rock fashion at its most iconic — the brief is classic rock but make it stadium-scale. Band tees are the undisputed hero piece — a vintage or vintage-inspired Scorpions or classic rock graphic tee is the most catalog-relevant item. The leather jacket is essential for both men and women — real or leather-look, it is the rock concert layer that never fails. Women can push toward rock-glam for the Scorpions — a dark sequin or metallic accent piece with ripped denim, or a black co-ord with studded details and a leather jacket over the top. The April Bengaluru heat opens up sleeveless options — a sleeveless band tee or dark sleeveless top with ripped black denim and a jacket tied at the waist. Men in a classic Scorpions or rock band tee with heavily distressed dark denim and a leather jacket — the arena rock uniform perfected. Rock You Like A Hurricane demands your most powerful rock outfit. Chain necklaces layered, chunky silver rings, stud earrings, spike bracelets, and cross pendants — rock jewellery signature. Bandanas tied at the wrist or neck. Caps backward. Crossbody bags — hands free for lighters up. Ripped and distressed denim across light to heavy distress levels. Wind of Change plays and your outfit becomes a memory.

app.headline: Rock You Like A Hurricane Fit.
lines: Band tee, leather jacket, ripped denim — arena rock sorted.
Wind of Change plays better in the right outfit.
Five decades of rock royalty deserve your best dark fit.

social_media.headline: Still Loving You. Still Dressing Like This.
lines: POV: Scorpions open with Rock You Like A Hurricane and your leather jacket and band tee become the whole concert poster.
Scorpions World Tour fit check — vintage band tee, heavily distressed denim, chain necklace. Classic rock never dies.

events.title: No Makeup Day
events.genres: Wellness, Self-Care, Pop Culture, Gen Z Cultural Moment, Beauty
events.description: No Makeup Day is a Gen Z-celebrated moment of radical self-acceptance — a day to let skin breathe, embrace natural beauty, and let the outfit do all the heavy lifting.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: No Makeup Day is a pure Gen Z wellness and self-acceptance cultural moment — genZScore 7-9. The beauty brief is clear — no makeup, natural skin, effortless. But the fashion response to no makeup is very specific in Gen Z culture — when the face is bare, the outfit has to be exceptional. This is the clean girl aesthetic taken to its purest form. The fashion energy is quiet luxury meets effortless chic — the kind of dressing that looks incredible without any beauty enhancement. Think perfectly fitted basics, interesting textures, clean silhouettes, and a color palette that complements natural skin tones. Neutral and warm tones dominate — cream, beige, caramel, sage, warm white, soft brown, terracotta. The clean girl aesthetic is the dominant fashion reference — matching sets, linen basics, well-fitted co-ords, minimal jewellery. This is also a strong nail care moment — on No Makeup Day, natural nails or a clean nude manicure become the beauty statement, making nail care products highly relevant.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: No Makeup Day has one fashion rule — when the face is bare the outfit must be flawless. The clean girl aesthetic is the entire brief. Lead with perfectly fitted basics in warm neutral tones — a cream ribbed co-ord, a sage linen set, or a caramel wide-leg trouser with a simple white tee. The texture story is critical on No Makeup Day — ribbed knits, linen weaves, and soft cotton textures all look beautiful against natural skin and photograph incredibly well without any beauty filter. Women in a clean beige linen co-ord, a terracotta midi dress with minimal jewellery, or a white oversized linen shirt with straight-fit cream trousers. Men in a clean cream or sage linen shirt with well-fitted beige or white trousers — effortless and intentional. Dainty gold jewellery is the only accessory needed — a thin chain, small hoop earrings, a simple ring stack. Nail care is uniquely the beauty hero of the day — clean nude nails or a fresh natural manicure is the No Makeup Day beauty statement. Small structured bags in neutral tones. The overall energy is — looking your most beautiful without trying, which requires trying harder than anything.

app.headline: No Makeup. Let The Fit Talk.
lines: Cream linen, sage co-ord, dainty gold — clean girl sorted.
Bare skin needs a flawless outfit. We have both covered.
Natural beauty day calls for your most effortless look.

social_media.headline: Bare Face. Immaculate Fit. Go.
lines: POV: No Makeup Day and your cream ribbed co-ord is doing more work than any foundation ever could.
No Makeup Day fit check — neutral tones, linen textures, dainty jewels, natural nails. Clean girl won.

events.title: Bangalore Karaga
events.description: Bangalore Karaga is one of the oldest and most sacred festivals of Bengaluru — a grand overnight procession dedicated to Goddess Draupadi Devi, celebrated by the Thigala community with deep devotion, fire rituals, and a breathtaking flower-adorned procession through the old city.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Bangalore Karaga is one of Bengaluru's most ancient and sacred festivals — genZScore 1-3. This is a deeply traditional, community-specific religious event — primarily the Thigala community but observed and respected across Bengaluru. The procession is overnight and outdoor — practical yet devotional dressing is essential. The fashion language is purely ethnic and traditional — no western, no fusion, no embellishments for show. Women in traditional cotton sarees in auspicious colors — red, yellow, green, and white are most sacred for this festival. Men in traditional dhotis, veshtis, or simple kurta-pyjama. The flower garland and sacred context means clean, simple, breathable ethnic dressing. Saffron is deeply relevant — it is the color of devotion for this festival. Jewellery is traditional and minimal — simple gold pieces, nothing ostentatious. The procession context means comfortable, practical ethnic dressing — breathable cotton fabrics essential for an overnight outdoor event.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Bangalore Karaga demands the purest and most traditional ethnic dressing — this is not a fashion moment, it is a devotional one. Women in traditional cotton sarees in red, yellow, or green with minimal gold zari borders — the Karaga red saree is the most iconic and auspicious choice. Silk-feel cotton sarees with temple-border zari are uniquely appropriate. Simple, clean draping — no heavy embellishment or party styling. Men in white or cream dhoti-veshti with a simple cotton kurta or angavastram — the most traditional and respectful choice for an overnight religious procession. Khadi fabric is uniquely appropriate for the devotional context. Breathable 100% cotton is essential — the procession is overnight and outdoor through Bengaluru's old city. Minimal traditional jewellery — simple gold jhumkas, plain bangles, a basic necklace, and meaningful amulet pieces. No heavy embellishments, no designer pieces, no western accessories. Kids ethnic sets in auspicious colors are relevant — Karaga is a deeply community and family festival. The overall energy is pure reverence — dressed for the Goddess, not for the gram.

app.headline: Bengaluru's Oldest Festival. Dress With Reverence.
lines: Red cotton saree or white dhoti — Karaga calls for purity.
Traditional, breathable, and deeply devotional — that's the brief.
Dress for the Goddess. Everything else follows.

social_media.headline: Bangalore Karaga. Sacred And Timeless.
lines: POV: wore a red cotton saree to Bangalore Karaga and felt the weight of centuries of devotion.
Karaga fit check — traditional cotton saree, simple gold jewels, full reverence. Bengaluru's oldest night.

events.title: Shaan Live
events.genres: Music, Live Concert, Bollywood, Pop, Romantic
events.description: Shaan brings his velvety Bollywood voice live — a warm, nostalgic night of timeless Hindi film songs, soulful melodies, and the kind of music that wraps around you like a memory you never want to leave.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: Shaan is one of Bollywood's most beloved voices — genZScore 4-6. His audience spans nostalgic millennials and older GenZ who grew up on his iconic songs — Tanha Dil, Ek Pal Ka Jeena, Do Pal. The concert energy is warm, nostalgic, and deeply romantic — not edgy, not high-energy EDM, just beautifully sentimental. The fashion mood mirrors the music — warm, put-together, and softly elevated. This is a smart casual to dressy casual event — people make an effort but it's not black-tie. Think warm jewel tones, soft neutrals, comfortable yet stylish silhouettes. Women in midi dresses, elegant co-ords, or a warm-toned top with well-fitted trousers. Men in a well-fitted shirt in warm tones — burgundy, navy, olive — with smart trousers. The Bengaluru crowd adds a contemporary spin. Jewellery is elegant and moderate — not too heavy, not too minimal. The overall energy is — dressed warmly for a night that will make you feel everything.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Shaan live is a warm Bollywood nostalgia concert — dress like the setlist is going to bring you to tears in the best possible way. Tanha Dil energy meets smart Bengaluru evening dressing. Women in a warm-toned midi dress in burgundy or rust, an elegant satin co-ord in deep teal or navy, or a flowy floral top with wide-leg trousers — put-together but comfortable for a long emotional setlist. Men in a well-fitted button-down in burgundy, olive, or navy with smart dark trousers — the classic Bollywood concert smart casual. Jewellery is elegant and warm — gold-tone pieces, teardrop earrings, a simple layered necklace. Small structured bags or a soft clutch for women. A clean watch for men. The overall energy is — dressed warmly enough to match every song that hits differently live.

app.headline: Shaan Live. Dress For The Feels.
lines: Warm tones, elegant fits — Tanha Dil energy sorted.
Bollywood nostalgia hits different in the right outfit.
Smart casual for the night every song becomes a memory.

social_media.headline: Shaan Live. Every Song, A Feeling.
lines: POV: Shaan starts Tanha Dil and your burgundy co-ord is doing all the emotional heavy lifting.
Concert fit check — warm jewel tones, elegant silhouette, dressed like the setlist already has you.

events.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
events.description: Mario and Luigi blast off into the stars again — Bowser Jr. is determined to free his father and restore the Koopa family legacy, sending the brothers on their most cosmic and colorful adventure yet across galaxies old and new.

fashion_keywords.reasoning: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is the most joyfully colorful family film of April 2026 — genZScore 7-9. The Mario franchise has one of the most universally recognized and fashion-translatable character palettes in all of pop culture. The screening crowd spans families with young children, gaming-native GenZ, and nostalgic millennials who grew up with Galaxy on the Wii. The poster colors — dusty purple-lavender and deep midnight navy-purple — directly reference the cosmic galaxy aesthetic of the film's setting, giving a more sophisticated fashion direction beyond just the primary red and blue of Mario's classic look. Character fashion references are exceptionally rich: (1) Mario — the iconic red and blue, red cap with M, classic dungarees; (2) Luigi — green and blue, quieter but equally strong; (3) Princess Peach — pink, gold, and regal; (4) Bowser Jr. — the new antagonist, orange-yellow, spiky energy, and a kid villain's maximalist chaos aesthetic; (5) Rosalina — the Galaxy's signature character, powder blue and silver, ethereal and cosmic. The galaxy setting opens a cosmic color direction — deep purples, midnight blue, silver, and star-inspired accessories. April in Bengaluru is warm and transitional — breathable fabrics essential. Kids categories are critically relevant — this is a family film event.
fashion_keywords.style_notes: Super Mario Galaxy Movie screening is the most cosmically colorful family fashion moment of April — five character directions all translate beautifully into catalog pieces. Mario direction — the most universally recognizable. Red cap, red tee, blue denim co-ord — the Mario color combination is as catalog-direct as it gets. A red graphic tee with blue straight-fit jeans and a red cap is the most perfect Mario screening fit. Luigi direction — the quieter but equally valid sibling aesthetic. Green tee, blue denim, green cap — identical logic, different color. Princess Peach direction — women and girls in pink and gold — a pink co-ord, a pastel pink dress, or any pink piece with gold accessories channels Peach's regal energy beautifully. Rosalina direction — the most sophisticated character aesthetic, unique to the Galaxy film. Powder blue and silver with star accessories — a pale blue dress or blue and silver co-ord with star pendant jewellery is the most fashion-forward Mario screening look and uniquely references this specific film's setting. Bowser Jr. direction — orange-yellow and spiky chaos energy for the fans who root for the villain kid. The cosmic galaxy setting opens a broader purple and midnight navy direction — deep purple co-ords with silver star accessories for the most editorial screening approach. Kids onesies and character-print tees are the most heartwarming catalog category. Star jewellery and accessories are uniquely relevant for the Galaxy setting. April warmth means breathable cotton and lightweight fabrics in all these bold colors.

app.headline: The Galaxy Awaits. So Does This Outfit.
lines: Mario red, Luigi green, Peach pink, Rosalina blue — pick your character.
The most colorful screening of April needs the most colorful wardrobe.
Wahoo — your outfit just became the best one in the galaxy.

social_media.headline: Let's-A Go. The Fit Is Ready.
lines: Super Mario Galaxy dress code — red cap and denim for Mario, powder blue and stars for Rosalina, pink and gold for Peach. The galaxy has excellent fashion sense.
Wahoo! Red tee, blue jeans, and a star pendant for the most cosmically fun screening of the year. Super Mario Galaxy Movie, April 1st. ⭐🍄🌌
